title: Thai-Style Roasted Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy curry made with roasted chicken, intense flavors, and a hint of malaysian spices.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
In a blender or food processor, combine the curry paste, coconut milk, and 2 tablespoons of water. Blend until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the blended curry mixture and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is roasting, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced tomato and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir the cooked tomato into the curry sauce and serve over the roasted chicken.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
